channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Autorickshaw driver arrested for brutally assaulting a 4-year-old after dispute with child’s father in Palghar
item.description: A shocking incident took place in Vasai, Palghar district of Maharashtra, where an autorickshaw driver allegedly attacked a four-year-old boy following a quarrel with the child’s father. According to ...

item.title: Gikomba Market Traders Face Losses as County Clears Riverbank Structures
item.description: Nairobi's Gikomba Market was thrown into chaos after Nairobi County officials demolished part of the shoe section in an overnight operation. The demolition targeted stalls located on riparian land, wh...

item.title: Five Citizen Science Projects Making Real-World Impacts in Australia
item.description: Citizen science allows members of the public to contribute to scientific research, often filling gaps that professionals cannot cover alone. In Australia, several initiatives have demonstrated the rea...

item.title: King Charles set for US visit amid UK-US diplomatic tensions
item.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla are scheduled to make a state visit to the United States in late April. This visit is part of long-term plans to celebrate 250 years since the U.S. gained independence f...

item.title: Capital FM Hosts Forum to Promote Ethical Leadership and Civic Engagement in Kenya
item.description: Capital FM in Nairobi has taken a strong stance on shaping national discourse by hosting its Leadership and Governance Forum at the Kenya School of Government. The Managing Director, Symon Bargurei, s...

item.title: US Army Suspends Aircrew After Apache Helicopters Hover at Kid Rock's Tennessee Home
item.description: The US Army has suspended the aircrew of two AH-64 Apache helicopters from flight duties following an incident where the aircraft hovered near Kid Rock's Nashville-area mansion on March 28, 2026. The ...

item.title: CRDB recognized as leading trade finance bank in East Africa
item.description: CRDB Bank has been recognised as the 'Best Trade Partner Bank East Africa 2026' by the International Finance Corporation (IFC), appreciating its efforts in boosting trade finance across East and Centr...

item.title: Kenya Faces Rising Debt Pressure and Calls for Improved Borrowing Oversight
item.description: Kenya is facing mounting fiscal pressure as public debt climbs to Sh12.29 trillion, equivalent to 67.8 percent of GDP, surpassing the legal limit. The Controller of Budget, Margaret Nyakang'o, caution...

item.title: BJD and BJP clash over Nishikant Dubey’s remarks on Biju Patnaik
item.description: In Odisha, a controversial remark by BJP MP Nishikant Dubey regarding the legendary Biju Patnaik has ignited political tensions. Biju Janata Dal (BJD) supremo Naveen Patnaik condemned the statement sh...

item.title: Soweto Residents Volunteer to Clean Streets and Transform Dumping Sites into Gardens
item.description: In Soweto, over two dozen residents, ranging from teenagers to pensioners, are actively volunteering to clean streets and tackle the widespread issue of illegal dumping in Gauteng. The initiative, kno...

item.title: Tanzania develops national guidelines for Point-of-Care Ultrasound use in healthcare
item.description: The Ministry of Health, in partnership with the University of Dodoma (UDOM), has convened health sector stakeholders to prepare national guidelines for the use of Point-of-Care Ultrasound (POCUS). The...

item.title: Guide to Boarding Matatus from Nairobi to Ngong Town
item.description: Ngong town, about 23 km from Nairobi CBD, is easily accessible via several matatu stages. Major boarding points include Railways Bus Station on Haile Selassie Avenue, Kencom House along Moi Avenue, To...

item.title: President Marcos orders police protection for girl reporting local official's abuses
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has taken immediate action after receiving a letter from an 11-year-old girl from Camarines Sur detailing alleged harassment and abuse by a barangay official. The letter...

item.title: First Nations Advocate Requests Criminal Investigation into FSIN Financial Audit
item.description: Rob Louie, founder and president of the Band Member Alliance and Advocacy Association of Canada (BMAAAC), has requested that police investigate the Federation of Sovereign Indigenous Nations (FSIN) fo...

item.title: BoT launches government-backed credit guarantee to expand access to loans
item.description: Bank of Tanzania (BoT) imeweka mipango ya kuanzisha Credit Guarantee Corporation (CGC) kwa ajili ya benki za biashara. Lengo la mpango huu ni kurahisisha upatikanaji wa fedha kwa watu binafsi na biash...

item.title: Apple TV+ to release new adaptation of ‘Cape Fear’ starring Javier Bardem, Patrick Wilson, and Amy Adams on June 5
item.description: A new television adaptation of Martin Scorsese’s 1991 thriller ‘Cape Fear’ is set to premiere on Apple TV+ on June 5. The series is created by Nick Antosca, known for his psychological horror works, a...

item.title: Australians face $2 billion in scam losses as anti-scam legislation awaits implementation
item.description: Australians lost more than A$2 billion to scams in 2025, marking a 7.8% increase from 2024, according to the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC). The main types of scams included inv...

item.title: Jordan And Nigeria Super Eagles Play Out 2-2 Friendly Draw
item.description: Nigeria wrap up their March international fixtures with a hard-fought 2-2 draw against Jordan, who are heading to the World Cup and currently ranked 64th globally. Jordan take early lead in the 17th m...

item.title: KSE-100 recovers strongly following previous day’s steep decline
item.description: After a steep fall driven by war-related fears, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) rebounded sharply on Tuesday as the benchmark KSE-100 index surged by 1,900.34 points, closing at 148,743.31. This rep...

item.title: The Overlooked Environmental Impact of Conflict and Climate Change
item.description: The article explores the interplay between war, environmental degradation, and climate change, emphasizing how long-term ecological consequences are often neglected during post-war reconstruction. The...
